entry.title: Re: How a Citizen Developer Can Use SAP Build Process Automation to Automate Workshop Requests

Does the BPA workflow support the "save as draft" functionality? Thank you

entry.title: Re: MDK Code Not Working on Android Device - Unable to Re...
entry.content: Instead of doing this in onLoad, I would suggest you use a rule for the Target of your data table that returns the result of your API call. If needed, you can still cache the result in Client Data and your rule can check first if cached data exists and return it or make the API call as needed.

entry.title: Re: Hi Please help me with error. G/L account 4000 cannot...
entry.content: Thanks for the Help

entry.title: Issue with AppUpdate.action Causing App Crash
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have developed an MDK app and encountered an issue with the update functionality. Specifically, I have implemented an update button within the profile page of the app. When a user clicks this button, it initiates the update check and displays the available update. However, upon clicking the "Update Now" button, the app crashes in both the SAP Mobile Service client and the branded app (Android platform) I created.

For the update process, I am using the AppUpdate.action. Below are the steps I followed:

  1. User clicks the update button.
  2. The app checks for updates and displays the available update.
  3. User clicks "Update Now".
  4. The app crashes immediately.

Could you please assist me in resolving this issue? Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Re: How to redeem a campaign code to get a free SAP Certification exam attempt and schedule your exa

Hi @David_Chaviano, 

I have completed the courses and sent an email to digitalskills@sap.com with a screenshot but I haven't received a reply. Could you please assist with this?
Thank you.
Email(Gmail) from luluchu0516

entry.title: Re: MDK Code Not Working on Android Device - Unable to Re...
entry.content: Hi @bill_froelich, Thank you for the suggestion. Could you please provide an example of a rule for using the target of a data table? Additionally, which target should I choose: string target or function call target? Thanks for your help!

entry.title: Re: Issue with AppUpdate.action Causing App Crash
entry.content: You should review the logs on the client.  Most likely the logs will provide information about why the App Update bundle is causing a crash.  Do your metadata definitions try to reference an extension?

entry.title: Re: MDK Code Not Working on Android Device - Unable to Re...
entry.content: You would use a String Target pointed to your rule that returns the array of data to display.

entry.title: "DAOException: HibernateException" error in Onboarding
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am facing an error in ONB2.0 while updating the employee recurring pay componenent.

"java.lang.IllegalStateException: java.lang.IllegalStateException: com.successfactors.db.dao.DAOException: HibernateException on updating instance of type class com.successfactors.hris.bean.eo.EmpPayCompRecurringEO"

Can someone help me in resolving the issue?

Thanks, and Regards

Avinesh Sundar

entry.title: PDI BAdI to pass values to the additional fields of the XML in the SAFT report
entry.content:
In this blog, you learn how to use PDI-BAdI to customize the logic and pass data to the additional XML fields for SAFT reporting in SAP Business ByDesign.

In general, you perform the following to pass data to the XML fields:

  1.  Create the structure for additional sections and fields, which are then added to the main SAFT report/XML structure.
  2. Write the code to fetch data from the required Business Objects and develop the logic to pass data to the header section of XML fields.

The PDI-BAdI feature helps you avoid writing source code to fetch data from different Business Objects (BO) and assign values to additional section fields in the main source code of the SAFT report. You can use PDI-BAdI to write your own logic and pass data to the XML fields of the SAF-T report. You need to implement the "PDI-BAdI" in Cloud Application Studio to write logic that passes the data effectively.

The following steps guide you on how to implement the BAdI.

1. Create a structure and fields for additional sections of the SAF-T report's XML

Master, Source Documents and General Ledger Entries are the new additional sections added to the SAF-T Report’s XML Structure.

Master section contains General ledger Accounts, Customer , Supplier, Tax Table entry , Analysis Type table entry, Product, Asset, Taxonomies, UOM table, Movement Type Table, Physical stock and Owner structure and fields.

2. Open the Cloud Application studio and create a new solution. Enter the required parameter details.

Select the created solution and add a New Item

Select Enhancement Implementation and click on Add Button.

Enter the Namespace and Enhancement Option details

Enhancement Implementation is created

Partner can write their own logic to pass data to the XML fields of SAF-T report in the GENERATE_TAX_AUDIT_FILE.

Sample code logic to pass the values.

3. Create a new SAF-T report.

Go to work center General Ledger - SAF-T Report. Click on New -->Create New SAF-T report. Enter the required data in the selection parameters and click on Generate Button

New SAF-T report is created with status 'Finished'.

Select the Generated SAF-T Report and click on View results. Navigate to the Attachments tab.

Open the file and check newly added additions sections such as Master , Source documents and General Ledger entries present in it.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Analytics Average Calculation
entry.content:
Hi @Abraham3,

Aggregation operates at the parent level, which is why it displays the same value as profit. To calculate the average, we need to consider child-level members. As shown in Screenshot 1, we first calculate the total profit, and in Screenshot 2, we determine the count of regions.

 

The chart illustrates the average profit region-wise.

 

Let me know if you'd like further refinements

Please upvote if the answer is correct!

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Commerce Automation PO and GR from Non SAP to Ariba N...
entry.content:
Hi, you can send messages.

Mind that there is no concept of reversal in Ariba in a way you do it in SAP.

What Ariba will accept is negative receiving which becomes sort of "un-receiving" in Ariba Invoice Mgmt.

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting SAP Certification discount code for special programs
entry.content:
HI ALL, 
IF YOU ARE FACING THIS ISSUE
"We are unable to provide invoice as a payment option at this point. Please contact SAP Accounts Receivable." 


SOLUTION THAT WORKS FOR ME BECAUSE I WAS APPLYING FROM MIDDLE EAST, I PUT 00000 as A ZIP CODE.
AND THEN CONTINUE OPTION IS SHOWING

IF IT WORKS GIVE A KUDO 😉

sorry but I prominent this message because this is the last week of code redemption.

entry.title: Updating PurchaseDownPayments with a service layer error: "Unallowed item cost [DPO1.INMPrice]
entry.content:
hello：

I encountered an error while updating my PurchaseDownPayments using the service layer, prompting "Unallowed item cost [DPO1. INMPrice][line: 1]"

My steps are as follows:

1. A PurchaseDownPayments was added, POST :https://IP:50000/b1s/v1/PurchaseDownPayments,code:

{
   "DocDate":"2024-12-24",
    "U_HBYID":"YFK2412240004",
    "DocumentLines":[
        {
            "InventoryQuantity":20,
            "TaxTotal":28.99,
            "ItemCode":"111020031",
            "VatGroup":"J2",
            "LineNum":1,
            "BaseType":-1,
            "Price":11.150442,
            "PriceAfterVAT":12.6,
            "LineTotal":223.01,
            "GrossTotal":252,
            "LastBuyInmPrice": 0.0,
            "StockInmPrice": 0.0,
            "UnitsOfMeasurment":1
        },
        {
            "InventoryQuantity":30,
            "TaxTotal":34.51,
            "ItemCode":"111020031",
            "VatGroup":"J2",
            "LineNum":2,
            "BaseType":-1,
            "Price":8.849558,
            "PriceAfterVAT":10,
            "LineTotal":265.49,
            "GrossTotal":300,
            "LastBuyInmPrice": 0.0,
            "StockInmPrice": 0.0,
            "UnitsOfMeasurment":1
        }
    ],
    "TaxDate":"2024-12-24",
    "Comments":"",
    "BPL_IDAssignedToInvoice":1,
    "DownPaymentType":"dptRequest",
    "CardCode":"S0000006",
    "DocDueDate":"2024-12-24",
    "DocTotal":552
}

 2. I changed the ratio to 80% in the client

3. I used the service layer for patch update, PATCH :https://IP:50000/b1s/v1/PurchaseDownPayments,code:

{
   "DocDate":"2024-12-24",
    "U_HBYID":"YFK2412240004",
    "DocumentLines":[
        {
            "InventoryQuantity":20,
            "TaxTotal":28.99,
            "ItemCode":"111020031",
            "VatGroup":"J2",
            "LineNum":1,
            "BaseType":-1,
            "Price":11.150442,
            "PriceAfterVAT":12.6,
            "LineTotal":223.01,
            "GrossTotal":252,
            "LastBuyInmPrice": 0.0,
            "StockInmPrice": 0.0,
            "UnitsOfMeasurment":1
        },
        {
            "InventoryQuantity":30,
            "TaxTotal":34.51,
            "ItemCode":"111020031",
            "VatGroup":"J2",
            "LineNum":2,
            "BaseType":-1,
            "Price":8.849558,
            "PriceAfterVAT":10,
            "LineTotal":265.49,
            "GrossTotal":300,
            "LastBuyInmPrice": 0.0,
            "StockInmPrice": 0.0,
            "UnitsOfMeasurment":1
        }
    ],
    "TaxDate":"2024-12-24",
    "Comments":"",
    "BPL_IDAssignedToInvoice":1,
    "DownPaymentType":"dptRequest",
    "CardCode":"S0000006",
    "DocDueDate":"2024-12-24",
    "DocTotal":552
}

 

Then I got an error and the version I was using was 2411.

The above operations I can directly operate in the client successfully.

Thanks

Thanit

entry.title: IT582 Exemption
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

As I am a freshman, guide me to achieve this requirement Internet allowance exemptions WT 2S31 (copied from MCAX). subtype for Exemptions infotype (0582) - "ZINT."

Under New Tax Reg paying through IT0014, need exemption until Rs. 5000.If the bill amount in IT582 exceeds the amount in IT0014, the full amount should be taxable. How can I achieve this?. Where can I see the changes in the RT log?

I have maintained below-listed tables & Schema

V_T7INT7: Define Tax Codes
V_T7INT9: Assign Tax Code Limits to Wage Types
V_T7INA9: Calculate Eligibility for RAPs
In schema (INN1) payroll function (INCTX),


 
My question is, where can I see those exemptions and taxable amounts?

If I check on PC 30 32 33, I am facing this error (screenshot below). 

By analysing the error, I don't have any duplicate entries in IT0014.

Also, suggest me PC, CC, and EC for the WT 2S31 and share a screenshot of the RT log /130 and /4.. series screenshot before and after exemptions.

Your input is appreciated. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Combining 2 Dropdowns in an optimized story - SAC

entry.title: Re: Capacity leveling with alternative Work center/capacity.

entry.title: Re: The settlement rule receiver : Issue with S/4 HANA EA...
entry.content:
Greetings,

if you want to pull a settlement receiver from you technical object you need to maintain the default object type setting.

If your requirement is to have one default settlement object type per order type then this can be achieved by standard. If you order type can have a mix of default settlement object type (depending on what's maintained on reference technical object master data) then you might need to explore some user exits which would be triggered at settlement rule creation on specific order.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: DataAction copy step
entry.content:
Hi @Bernardo_Santos1

Is the source data on the separated below 2 versions? 

  • Forecast: Forecast for the first six months of 2024
  • Prediction: Followed by predictions for the remaining months of the year.

In addition, how can we set the first six months? Does the end user dynamically set it using the External parameter(ex, 202406) or does Data action refer to the Version dimension property(ex, CurrentPeriod = 202406)? 

Moonjun

entry.title: Re-initializing of deltas in BW4HANA from S4HANA (For error Subscription for DTP* deleted in source)
entry.content:
Overview:

Re-initializing deltas between S4HANA and BW4HANA is vital for maintaining precise data synchronization. This process entails removing the existing initialization request in BW4HANA, purging previous data from the data targets, and establishing a new initialization. The error message indicates that the subscription for the Data Transfer Process (DTP) has been removed in the source system (S4HANA).

To address this issue, examine the DTP settings in BW4HANA, recreate the subscription if necessary, review system logs for further details, and re-initialize the delta process.

Error Occurred in BW4HANA System:

Subscription for DTP* deleted in source system. The error is due to deletion on subscription in S4 side or the subscription of DTP is mapped to wrong source system.

 

Check ODQMON by putting data source name in queue and see the subscriptions. 

 

Solution to the error:

Step 1) To delete a subscription in T-Code ODQMON in S4HANA, open ODQMON, select the DataSource, go to the "Subscriptions" tab, and delete the desired subscription. Confirm the deletion by checking the "Queues" tab to ensure the request is inactive. 

 

Step 2) To initiate a new subscription from BW4HANA to S4HANA, it is essential to delete all existing requests in the target system. If these requests are not removed, you will encounter errors. Therefore, ensure that all pending requests are cleared before proceeding with the new subscription setup. This step is crucial to avoid any interruptions or issues during the process.

Open the monitor in SAP GUI

Change overall Status to RED 

And delete the requests one by one. Please ensure all the requests are deleted from the target before moving to next step.

Step 3) To begin, manually initiate the Data Transfer Process (DTP) in delta mode using Eclipse. After starting the DTP, check the ODQMON transaction in your S4HANA system to confirm that a new subscription has been created. This verification step is crucial to ensure that the data transfer setup is functioning correctly.

 

Note** If you continue to encounter errors on the BW4HANA side after completing the previous steps, please run the report RODPS_REPL_TEST in transaction SE38 for the data source on the S4HANA side. This report will help diagnose and resolve any remaining issues with the data transfer process.

entry.title: Re: What you have always wanted to know about Dunning in S4HC
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Currently I am working on the S4 Hana Public Cloud project for dunning. I have two questions now. 

1. Do we have a workflow for Dunning in the public cloud?

2. I want to send Dunning notices to the Dunning recipient customer email ID. 

We have tried it, but the system is allowed only OPD setting email, which is maintained in the main customer general data email ID only. 

Is there any solution to get the Dunning recipient customer email ID directly?

entry.title: Re: too many tags
entry.content: Dear customer, Kindly know the SAP for Me development team responsible has also got the similar request from some other customers and they have been working on the enhancement here that in the future (maybe) only the top 3 tags will be shown here, but customer still has the option to ‘See More’ to display all the relevant tags here. The new feature has been in process and might be released early 2025. Kindly wait further. Best regards, SAP Support

Request to please help us out. FYI we have V3 Fiscal Year Variant.

 

 

 

 

All the configuration has been check and proper . For some of the Assets no issue. Asset Transfer Date 30.09.2017

entry.title: Re: Question on COF
entry.content:
Dear PCA, 

1. If you have added JA in the COF, it should be in the export of the COF. Please try again, and if you see the same symptom, please make it sure to be shared with the SAP Delivery Team in S2DHO meeting verbally. (You should highlight that JA language is required - to the PL or PC3 team in the S2DHO meeting)

2. Please finalise the solution range before closing the COF. Once closed, it cannot be edited. Also, please select S/4HANA EM if you are referring to the core RISE system. 

Hope this helped! 

Regards, Rin

entry.title: Re: Can user has user defined header/item condition in Sa...

entry.title: Re: Supplier Enablement Manage Vendors
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have got the answer to the question posted. We need to enable a feature and an entitlement with the help of SAP Ariba Support. Please check the KBA https://support.ariba.com/item/view/KB0401894 for more details on how to get the manage vendors option under Supplier enablement. After SAP Ariba Support team enabled the settings, am able to see the Manage Vendors option under Supplier Enablement.

Thanks,
Velu

Regards,


Ravi

entry.title: Re: Registration for Indirect Taxation Abroad (RITA) in 2302 - A Pragmatic Approach
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Hope you all are doing well!

We have company codes in "GB" & "DE" and multiple VAT registration across "European Union (EU)" and "Ireland (IE)" being one the VAT Registered location for sale of products in both these Company codes.  

I have a query with reference to the Country "Ireland" where as per below table in "Foreign Plant enabled" column, it says "N".

Does it mean that even after Country activation, we will not be able to create "IE" as a foreign plant for using the RITA functionality of Plant Abroad in both these Company Codes?

Please guide.

 

No.Country/Region RITA enabledForeign plant enabledCountry/Region activation required
   (Y/N)(Y/N)*(Y/N)**
11IEIrelandYNY

entry.title: Enhancing ABAP Code Security During Migration from ECC to S/4HANA
entry.content:
Migrating from SAP ECC to S/4HANA isn’t just a technical upgrade—it’s a complete reboot of your system. Developing and refining ABAP code becomes a key part of the process, as the entire logic of your business processes relies on it. But alongside the updated functionality, new potential vulnerabilities often emerge that could compromise security and even derail the successful launch of S/4HANA.

If you’re planning or already in the middle of migration, don’t overlook code security. In new scenarios—whether integrating with external services, updating custom modules, or building unique logic—one missed vulnerability can expose your sensitive data to significant risk.

Where the Risks Lie

  • New and adapted programs. When transferring legacy Z-programs or writing new ABAP code, it’s easy to miss SQL injections, backdoors, or other vulnerabilities.
  • Third-party components. If you’re implementing add-ons developed by external vendors, their code must also be thoroughly reviewed.
  • Integrations and extensions. Connecting to external services or integrating with SAP BTP increases the likelihood of potential security gaps.

During large-scale migrations to S/4HANA, there often isn’t enough time or resources to manually review every piece of code—especially when your developers are already knee-deep in deadlines.

How RedRays Can Help

RedRays has developed an AI-powered solution specifically designed to identify vulnerabilities in ABAP code. Its standout feature is the so-called “AIR mode,” where code analysis runs entirely in-memory.

What does this mean?

  • No traces. The scanner doesn’t store logs or export your source code, so your data remains completely confidential.
  • Real-time analysis. Results are available almost instantly, allowing developers to fix critical issues immediately.

Types of Vulnerabilities It Detects

  • Open SQL / Native SQL Injection
  • Directory Traversal
  • ABAP Command Injection
  • Operating System Command Injection
  • Unauthorized entry points and access
  • Various backdoors and logic errors

With RedRays, you won’t miss critical vulnerabilities—its AI excels at identifying patterns and risks that might seem harmless at first glance.

A Simple Start: Integration and Workflow

Seamless Integration with Your Tools

RedRays easily integrates with the IDEs you already use, including:

  • Eclipse (commonly used for ABAP development)
  • VS Code (a versatile, cross-platform IDE)
  • SAP Business Application Studio (SAP BTP’s native environment)

Once the plugin is installed, simply configure the URL and API key, and you’re ready to start scanning your code.

For Developers

  • Instant Feedback. After scanning, you’ll immediately receive a list of vulnerabilities along with recommendations for resolving them.
  • Prioritization. Issues are categorized by severity (Critical, High, Medium, Low), so you know what to address first.
  • User-Friendly Interface. RedRays provides step-by-step guidance for fixing each identified issue.

By embedding security checks directly into your daily workflow, you can proactively eliminate risks without waiting for something to break in production.

Why This Is Crucial During Migration to S/4HANA

Migrating to S/4HANA often brings significant changes to architecture and business processes. This means:

  • Data breach risks. Any vulnerabilities in new modules can lead to unauthorized access to sensitive information.
  • Compliance issues. Regulatory requirements like GDPR, SOX, and others can result in hefty fines if your system is not secure.
  • Reputation damage. Failures and security incidents can undermine trust with clients, partners, and investors.

Code security is often one of those aspects remembered “last minute,” but it’s the foundation of stable and secure operations in your S/4HANA environment.

How to Get Started with RedRays

  1. Install the plugin for your IDE (Eclipse, VS Code, or SAP Business Application Studio).
  2. Set up the URL and API key to activate the scanner.
  3. Run a scan. Select the code you need to analyze and get a detailed report in just one click.
  4. Fix vulnerabilities. Follow the recommendations provided by RedRays to patch issues before deployment.

Conclusion

Migrating to S/4HANA is not just about new functionality and optimization—it’s also about adopting updated security practices. The earlier you begin analyzing and improving your ABAP code, the fewer unpleasant surprises you’ll encounter down the line.

RedRays makes this process faster and easier. Its “AIR mode” ensures your code remains private, while intelligent algorithms detect even the trickiest vulnerabilities.

If you want to make your S/4HANA migration safe and stress-free, visit https://redrays.io/abap-scanner/ to learn more and get started.

entry.title: Re: Kit to stock process trigger from EWM using VAS order...
entry.content:
Hi

I am sharing it but you need to understand this carefully

Symptom

The error code L9029 can have more than one symptom when EWM queues are involved:

  • It might occur after adding a packing item for a Return to Vendor Delivery in the EWM system. The qRFC to update the ECC system gets stuck with the error code L9029 - "Error while determining ref.mov.type for WM via Table 156S". In the long text of the error message, you see that movement type 161 is mentioned;
  • In a kitting reversal process, after triggering the creation of an inbound delivery from EWM, the /SPE/INB_DELIVERY_SAVEREPLICA message gets stuck in ERP with error "Error while determining ref.mov.type for WM via Table 156S: 101/X/X/X/X/X/";
  • The error L9029 is called during the replication of a direct outbound delivery from EWM to the ERP system;
  • The problem occurs while trying to add a delivery item to an existing delivery, usually done via the replication of a BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE queue.

Environment

  • SAP ERP Central Component (ECC)
  • SAP Extended Warehouse Management (EWM)
  • SAP S/4HANA on premise 

Cause

Incorrect customizing.

Resolution

  1. The movement type 161 is not appropriate for packaging materials as it is only foreseen to be used for items with reference to a purchase order. For such cases, it is necessary to change the configuration so that, for example, movement type 601 is used instead. This is also described in the SAP Help Portal.

Additional packaging material items are supported in the following outbound deliveries:

  • Outbound deliveries with reference to a sales order
  • Replenishment deliveries with reference to a stock transport order
  • Direct outbound deliveries for the customer
  • Direct outbound deliveries to another plant

  1. The error message indicates that the wrong delivery type with wrong movement type 101 was chosen. Note that this scenario is not a normal inbound delivery scenario (type 'EL') with reference to a purchase order. Delivery type/item category must be 'HID'/'HIDN' or 'DIG'/'DIGN' respectively, defined in table /SPE/DIRDLV_TYPE. The Business Functions LOG_LE_INTEGRATION and LOG_PP_EWM_MAN also have to be activated to make this process functional. Note 1423321 explains about these Business Functions. For inbound deliveries, movement type 501 or 521 has to be assigned to the item category in 0VLP transaction, while for outbound deliveries the correct movement type is 601.

  2. In the customizing settings of transaction 0VLK, ensure that the field "Order required" is filled with value 'Goods movement through inb.deliv. / post.chge /outb. deliv.'. Test the process again after the change.

  3. Check the IMG activity Logistics Execution -> Extended Warehouse Management Integration -> Outbound Process -> Direct Outbound Deliveries -> Determine Item Categories for Direct Outbound Deliveries. As explained in this IMG Help:

"If you add items to an existing outbound delivery in EWM the system does not use the parameters "Code for the Initiator of a Communication Chain" and "EWM Delivery Type" for the item category determination; the item category determination is called with value SPACE for these parameters."

Hence, review the relevant entry in this customizing considering the item category and movement type used.

 

See if it works 

Regards

Rashid

entry.title: Re: Program to delete already released transports
entry.content: I developed custom program using FM TRINT_DELETE_COMM

entry.title: Download PDF locally (SAP R3, 4.0B)
entry.content:
Hello experts,
The client I am working on has SAP R3 version 4.0B! The requirement is to download a PDF file locally. The file is stored in the application server. Function module GUI_DOWNLOAD is not available in ABAP thus I am using WS_DOWNLOAD. I use open dataset for output in binary mode but then I don't know how to use 

READ DATASET since there is no xstring-equivalent to read into. Has anyone got any idea how to approach this?

Thank you in advance,

Konstantinos

entry.title: Re: Error HUGENERAL066 in LI20 During Inventory Write-Off
entry.content:
see this thread, it has same error in different scenario it may help you to solve

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/transfer-stock-between-hu-with-different-inspection-lot/qaq-p/8860043

entry.title: Re: formula for splitting fullname as firstname and lastn...
entry.content:
Define the following variables:

v_FirstName:    =Left([fullname];Pos([fullname]; " "))

v_LastName:  =Right([fullname];Length([fullname])-Rpos([fullname]; " "))

 

...

Hope it helps

entry.title: Re: FM_DLOI Error
entry.content:
Hi priyadarshan_behera,

I was stuck in the same situation, the step i was missing is to execute FM_DLOI  multiple times for the PO, without Do not delete documents in FYC marked. 

Please also make sure Period 16 is open for the FY affected in FMIR for the relevant value type.

Thanks

Atif

entry.title: Re: Migrate your data: FI - Accounts payable open item
entry.content: Here I attach a sample file for FI-Accounts payable open item, you can check and compare with your file to see if you can find the problem.

entry.title: ๊Update company info number for S-User
entry.content:
How can the super admin update company info number for S-User?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: ๊Update company info number for S-User
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

Unfortunately, the Super Admin does not have the ability to update the phone number in the Company Info section. Only the S-user has the capability to do so.

To update the phone number in the Company Info section, kindly instruct the user to follow the steps provided below: 

1. Access the following link: https://accounts.sap.com/ui/protected/profilemanagement
2. Navigate to the "Personal Information" section and click on "Edit"
3. Enter the new telephone number and click "Verify"
4. A code will be sent to the new telephone number. Please enter the code in the "Code" section.
5. Finally, click "Submit"

Please let me know if you have any further questions or concerns. 

Best regards,
Judy

entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm added LAF1 - WERKS field in MDG UI Screen, While creation of new supplier ,the  Plant fields is Auto varnished.

Thanks & Regards,

SAP Community SAP Master Data Governance,

entry.title: Re: transport dependancy check
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: How to get notification about SAP CloudSupport Alerts
entry.content:
I would like to receive SAP Cloud Alerts notifications (From: SAP CloudSupport Alerts <sapcloudsupport@alerts.ondemand.com>)

Current I am not receiving it , it goes to the management.

How to get such cloud system notifications?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to get notification about SAP CloudSupport Alerts
entry.content:
Dear customer,

In order to get SAP Cloud system notifications, kindly make sure you have subscribed to the relevant cloud product/service in the Get Notified application in SAP for Me.

Refer to the following KBAs about how to do the subscriptions:

- 2900069 - How S-users manage their own Cloud Notification subscriptions - SAP for Me
- 2896942 - How Super and Cloud Administrators manage Cloud Notification subscriptions for other users - SAP for Me

Hope the above information helps.

Thanks and regards,
Joanna

entry.title: Re: transport dependancy check
entry.content:
Hi Graham,

I’d like to share some insights from the ABAP perspective, as we also use a custom dependency check for every transport request.

To clarify, it’s not entirely custom, but we leverage a SAP standard program to perform the dependency checks and implement the CTS_REQUEST_CHECK to extend its functionality. While our approach might not be fully tailored, it could still give you some ideas or inspiration for your own implementation.

https://abapgeeks.com/how-to-check-transport-request-dependencies/

Thanks and Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Download PDF locally (SAP R3, 4.0B)
entry.content: If the X type exists, use it (READ DATASET repeatedly). These old systems are not Unicode, one character is one byte, so you may use C instead of X too.

entry.title: Help Me Understand Exemptions IT0582
entry.content:
Understanding the Requirement
As a freshman, I need guidance on achieving Internet allowance exemptions WT 2S31. This requirement is copied from MCAX and falls under the subtype for Exemptions infotype (0582) - ZINT.

Exemption Limit
Under the new tax regulations, payments are made through IT0014, and exemptions are allowed up to Rs.5000. If the bill amount in IT582 exceeds the amount in IT0014, the full amount becomes taxable. How can I make sure I meet this requirement?

Maintained Tables & Schema
I have maintained the following tables and schema based on the Configuration Link:
Link: https://help.sap.com/saphelp_erp60_sp/helpdata/en/a3/3be153038a424de10000000a174cb4/content.htm?no_cache=true
- V_T7INT7: Define Tax Codes
- V_T7INT9: Assign Tax Code Limits to Wage Types
- V_T7INA9: Calculate Eligibility for RAPs
In the schema (INN1) payroll function (INCTX).
INCTX    SEXM     MCAX     R     MCMX

Where to Find Exemptions and Taxable Amounts ?
If I check on PC 30 32 33, I am encountering an error (see screenshot below).

Error Analysis
Upon analysing the error, I found no duplicate entries in IT0014.

Request for PC, CC, and EC & Exemp in Result table
Please suggest the PC, CC, and EC for the WT 2S31 and provide screenshots of the RT log /130 and /4.. series Before, After exemptions, & taxable.

Your help is greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Question on COF
entry.content:
Hi Rin,

Thank you for clarification.
May I Know whether can we add the solution in case the requirement is changed after closing COF?

Best regards, 

Thanit

entry.title: Re: How to keep the same cost in Sales order and return o...
entry.content:
@Vivek_Savant  we faced a problem ,our company sells our product by online website ,and there are almost 8000 orders on our online website per day ,so we combine those online order into one SAP sales order and one SAP delivery per day

and we post sales revenue by customers confirmation ,once theg did't confirm there orsde ,we shouldn't post revenue of online order

there are two ways  1、reverse original online order dilivery ,but it is a combined order , VL09 only can reverse all items ,it affact other busninss 

2、we   creat a return sale order and copy original price type of VPRS ,we want  cost of return delivery    valued as VPRS when posted,but in fact it is  current inventory price ,it lead to unconsistency in cost of original and return order

now we need to solve one of those problem

entry.title: BOM批量更改 - 批量维护物料清单抬头(Scope item 6OT)
entry.content:
在传统的物料清单管理功能中，标准功能仅提供对物料清单的单个增加，删除和修改。我们了解到，客户对批量更改物料清单有着强烈的需求。SAP公有云系统在新的创新功能中推出了6OT这个Scope item，支持BOM工程师方便快捷地批量更改物料清单。基于这个功能，BOM工程师可以对单个或者多个BOM的抬头进行批量更改或删除，也可对单个或者多个BOM的组件进行批量添加、更改或者删除。在执行数据在数据库层面变更之前，您还可以先模拟变更，已确保变更的可执行性。

Scope item 6OT主要包括三个应用：批量维护物料清单抬头，批量添加物料清单项目，批量维护物料清单项目。我们拿“批量维护物料清单抬头”举例，看一下在公有云系统中的操作步骤：

1. 在批量维护物料清单抬头 应用的初始界面，可根据需要设置您对需要修改BOM的筛选条件：

输入物料、工厂后点击 “编辑”按钮。

2. 批量维护物料清单抬头 ，可以批量修改物料清单抬头中的“删除标识”、“基本数量”、“删除标识”等字段。

在变更这些信息时，可以选择输入ECN号进行变更， 以 批量修改“基本数量”为例，我们输入修改后的基本数量后，点击“模拟”按钮。

模拟后，可以看到模拟结果，如果成功后，可以点击“执行”，选择“后台运行作业”或“立即执行”完成变更。

 

“立即执行”后，可以看到成功变更后的结果。

查看BOM，可以看到 “基本数量” 被修改成新值。

————————————————————————————————————————————

**本博文中涉及到的截图均来源于SAP内部测试环境。

entry.title: Re: Download PDF locally (SAP R3, 4.0B)
entry.content: There is type X and it is hexadecimal. When I open the resulting file with notepad it is completely different with the original file in Appserver, the latter starts with '%PDF' which is necessary to open it with a Reader app

entry.title: Re: Download PDF locally (SAP R3, 4.0B)
entry.content: should I open the file in BINARY or is TEXT mode?

entry.title: Re: Transferring Carryover To A Separate Time Account
entry.content:
Thank you for the article. The issue discussed here is exactly the same as one I encountered with a requirement from one of my operations. I implemented this in my test system, and here are some findings:

  • This works perfectly fine for employees who were hired in previous years.
  • However, the logic fails for midterm hires.

The reason is that in the rule INTERIM_TRANSFER_2, the system fails to fetch the “balance at closing” (a custom field) because the "valid from" date of the time account is not the start of the previous year but rather the employee’s date of joining for midterm hires.

Could you suggest a workaround for this?

For now, I am manually creating an ad-hoc carryover account and loading the carry-forwarded leave by calculating the balance outside the system.

entry.title: Condition origin "D" in Sales Order
entry.content:
Dear Guru's,

I'm trying to figure out a scenario:  to create a header condition with fixed value(negative) which means such a coupon discount for the order. And hope the value can be distributed to multiple order items. For that, I've created a condition type with "header condition" only,  and set up in pricing procedure.

But, the issue is when i'm going into order creation, the condition type Origin is always = "E" item total.  Suppose it should be "D" header condition... Could anyone help here?  

thanks,

entry.title: How to question on Cloud Architecture Q&A
entry.content:
Dear Team, The Partner would like to register a new question on Cloud Architecture Q&A. But the partner could not do it.
Could you please show me how to question on on Cloud Architecture Q&A?

>SAP Community ->Partner Groups  ->ERP and Finance  ->SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition  ->Cloud Architecture  ->Cloud Architecture Q&A

Thank you and best regards,
Kenichi Yanou, Partner Business Manager

entry.title: Re: How to refresh backend service metadata and annotation files in VSCode Fiori Tools?
entry.content:
For BAS - Check in manifest.json.

Remove the localURI in the datasource for the service, metadata and annotation. This will force the app to load the metadata and annotations from the backend service and not refer to the local files.

entry.title: Re: How to refresh backend service metadata and annotation files in VSCode Fiori Tools?
entry.content:
For BAS - Check in manifest.json.

Remove the localURI in the datasource for the service, metadata and annotation. This will force the app to load the metadata and annotations from the backend service and not refer to the local files.

entry.title: Re: AL11: File Management and Inspection in the SAP System
entry.content: It might be useful to mention also ZAL11

entry.title: Re: Can user has user defined header/item condition in Sa...
entry.content: Glad to help you.

entry.title: Re: How to get a user account name (on windows OS)
entry.content: DATA: w_userid TYPE char20. CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_GET_DESKTOP_INFO' EXPORTING type = '5' CHANGING return = w_userid. WRITE: 'Windows User ID:', w_userid.

entry.title: Re: Architecture Decisions for Supplier Payment Collaboration
entry.content: Good day the link to SAP Business Network for Procurement  takes me to sharepoint site i do not have access to

entry.title: Re: Changed CDS annotations not refreshed in RAP Service...
entry.content:
Check in manifest.json while creating the FE app from VS Code.

Remove the localURI in the datasource for the service, metadata and annotation. This will force the app to load the metadata and annotations from the updated backend service and not refer to the local files.

entry.title: System locked; license is invalid or expired
entry.content:
I have migrated a server from a SUSE server to a Red Hat server, and after the migration, i have installed a temporary license for testing purposes. The temporary license expired or became invalid. Now, when i attempt to install a permanent license, i am encountering the following error: 

System locked; license is invalid or expired.
